title: aliciella nyensis
side_effects: Aliciella nyensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In severe cases, excessive consumption of Aliciella nyensis can cause liver damage and kidney failure. If not used under the guidance of a medical professional, the plant's toxic compounds can have serious and potentially life-threatening consequences.
